titleStmt.title: SII 29.125: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 125. (A.R. No. B. 773 of 1962-63.) RAÑJŌLE-KHĒṆI, BIDAR TALUK & DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab kept behind the Hanumān temple.

This damaged record is engraved as post script to the record No. 71, A.R. No. 772 above but 94 years after that of the Chālukya record dated 1115 A.D. It belongs to the reign period of Yādava Śinghaṇa, the king of the Yādavas of Dēvagiri family. The record is dated in his 10th regnal year, [Śaka 1130] Vibhava, Māgha, śu. Puṇṇame, lunar eclipse. Thursday, Pushya nakshatra corresponding to 1209 A.D., January 22. The nakshatra was however Āślēsha and not Pushya. The week day was Thursday and the lunar eclipse occured on that day.
It mentions Ayaryaṇa bhūpa of Aṭṭaḷe-nāḍu and refers to the great qualities of ārādhya Ballahadēva.

The record states that mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Ādyarasa had the god Hajjēśvaradēva reinstalled besides installing god Ādyēśvaradēva and made a gift of 300 mattar of his own land at Hajuvalige for the repairs of the temples after laving the feet of ārādhya Ballahadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
virūraḻte ṟevalliḷutiṟevaraṁ koluvalli koṭṭāgaḷiṁ nāvara riga nāmaṁ kāvallitānelā samīraṁ madhyamahāṁḍavalaradbhaya jyō
ṣṭaṁ pratiṣṭaṁdariṁdāraṁtellamamkāldu keṟepuvaḷi śrī naya śaśmudākarana lakṣadavatālu nagamāge niṁna tāchaṁnavati braraśmivāḷa
girddasāgarggeṇeyāgi bhāskaraṁ niṁna kripāṇarjjaḷadāda gaddaḷa (śrōtri)gaḷu biṁnanevāganiṁ negaḷdayaryaṇabhūpa mahītaḷāgradoḷu Aṭṭaḷda nāḍi
dunegaḷda kamaḷōdbhavanāṁ (jī)raṁgadoḷu tāḷdanēkayduvaṁ caṁgaḷāḍi bāybiṭṭa bhūmivallaḷsitabdikuḷaṁ kali ṁdra mutārddinarkkeltu bi
rddanene śauryyadamaya maḻudiṁ vicitra . hejjēsvarada pojjavali nittaṁtidyatiśaya dinadoḷu tāṁ tathyadēvartti mi
rkkadācaṁdrārkka . kāmaṁmaṟamagika dēvaṁ mecviḍuha bhavana dhareyoḷa gāvaṇāletigaḷa ballarhadavaṁgupamāna dānaguṇadoḷudayadoḷu
valara nuḍivānuḍigaḷa vā (danru)ta vanrūtaveṁdu bhāvisalaṟeyaṁ ballahadēva ttī(ṁ) draṁ mallanatāṁ nuḍidaḍa vekkarṇana vacanaṁ . Ivaṁ bhakti janake
kartthavanulāvaṁ karmmakaḷaṁkavaṁ sakaḷajīvaṁ jīvi(tṛ)kṛtva sadbhāvanu bhāvita muktivallabha niḷā lōkayka pūjyaṁ mahādāvaṁ ballahadēvaneṁdu bhuvanaṁ baṁṇārppadi dēvanaṁ . svasti śrī
madārādhyarenisida ballahadēvara kālaṁ karcci śrī manumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Adyarasaru śrīmatu yādava nārāyaṇaṁ pratāpa cakravartti siṁgaṇa
10 neya vibhava saṁvatsarada māgha sudda puṇṇame sōmagrahaṇa brahaspativāra puśya nakṣatra vetipāta yōgadaṁdu śrī hajjēsvaradēvara punaḥ pratiṣṭeyaṁ
ralu Ādyēsvaradēvara pratiṣṭeyaṁ māḍi jīrnnōddhārakkemeṁdu biṭṭa datti hajuvaligeyalli taṁmākamma mattaru 300 maṁ sarvanamasyavāgi koṭṭaru (anu) hajuvalige
bhōgābhyaṁtarasiddhidaṁ sarbbābādha parihāravāgi catusīmābhyaṁtara(meṣṭa) nidhi nikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa mādu diṣṭaliṁgaḷiṁ sarbbanavasyavāgi dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi bi
. maṁgaḷa mahāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.125 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
